{{Quote|Well I would expect an Imperial Officer to be arrogant enough not to be ready for my surprises.|[[Tyber Zann]] to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]|<ref name="EAW:FOC" />}}
The '''''Merciless''''' was [[Tyber Zann]]'s personal [[Aggressor-class destroyer|''Aggressor''-class destroyer]], which served as his and the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. The basis of the ''Aggressor''-class destroyer, it's design plans were found in the ruins of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destroyed]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] by the Zann Consortium. After realizing how effective it could be, it was stolen from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] hands and delivered to Tyber Zann. The ''Merciless'' was first used by Zann over [[Space Battle at Carida|Carida]] to great effect, prompting the creation of more ''Aggressor''-class destroyers. After the Empire's [[Battle of Endor/Legends|defeat]] over [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Zann, along with an accompanying [[Fleet (disambiguation)|fleet]], moved in on Kuat, finding the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fleet [[Battle for the Eclipse|attacking]] the remaining Imperial warships. The ''Merciless'' fought against the crumbling Imperial forces along with the Rebels until the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']] was captured.

==Characteristics==
The ''Merciless'' was a modified [[Aggressor-class destroyer|''Aggressor''-class destroyer]] stolen from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipyards. It was painted black with white trims and had intimidating murals of a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]] running along each side of the hull. It carried two massive, fire-linked [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion]] and [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] cannons fixed to the front of the ship. The ''Merciless'' also was armed with a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser battery]] on either side of the rear fins. The ship had a shield generator positioned on top of the bridge similar to the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]]. [[Tyber Zann]] also had a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] installed to aid in stealth attacks.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

==History==
The ''Merciless'' was the first of its class, created by the Empire as a prototype ''Aggressor''-class destroyer. It was stolen by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] after its plans were found in the wreckage of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].<ref name="EAW:FOC" /> The vessel was then modified and given a customized paintjob. The ''Merciless'' was completed during [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Tyber Zann was first spotted using the ship over [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. There, he was confronted by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. Thrawn informed him of the death of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], who was going to buy a [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifact]], then [[Space Battle at Carida|betrayed]] Zann over Carida. Thrawn then destroyed an [[Interceptor IV-class frigate|Interceptor IV frigate]], belonging to Zann, using a [[HVs-2 hypervelocity gun]] on the planet's surface. Zann countered Thrawns attack by bringing in his fleet, including the ''Merciless''. The two fought until Tyber's henchman [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] stole the artifact. Fleeing aboard the [[Hound's Tooth/Legends|''Hound's Tooth'']], Bossk delivered the artifact to Thrawn onboard his flagship the ''[[Admonitor]]''. Thrawn promptly fled. The rest of Thrawn's fleet was ordered to stay and destroy Tyber Zann's fleet. The Zann Consortium quickly defeated the Imperial ships. Zann then discovered the effectiveness of the ''Aggressor''-class Destroyer.

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|destruction]] of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]], the ''Merciless'', along with an accompanying fleet, [[Battle for the Eclipse|attacked]] the Imperial forces over [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. Their goal was to steal the unfinished [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fleet, intent on destroying all Imperial ships, arrived at the same time. The two groups formed a fragile alliance and began to attack three [[Cardan V-class space station|''Cardan V''-class space stations]]. Meanwhile, a [[RZ-52 Dekard transport|boarding shuttle]] was making its way over to the ''Eclipse''. The party boarded and claimed control of the massive warship. The Zann Consortium gained the upper hand and destroyed the Rebel and Imperial forces.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
There is a reference in the code of this ship being called "''Peacebringer''", which may have been the vessel's original name. Game data files still use "''Peacebringer''" for internal reference purposes.
